task.desc: Add a version field with value 2.0 to the evidence pack template JSON

l1.content: {"edit_description":"Add 'version': '2.0' to evidence-pack-template.json","target_files":["docs/05-OPERATIONS/evidence/evidence-pack-template.json"],"patch_commands":["sed -i \"s/\"version\": \"\"/\"version\": \"2.0\"/\"docs/05-OPERATIONS/evidence/evidence-pack-template.json\""],"validation_commands":["grep -q 'version' docs/05-OPERATIONS/evidence/evidence-pack-template.json","verify commands":["grep -q 'version' docs/05-OPERATIONS/evidence/evidence-pack-template.json","expected_outcome":"Template now includes version field set to 2.0","risk_notes":"No validation errors found","follow_up_type":"none|needs_review"}
